nodes.label: AI as collaborative tool for iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I would be more likely to collaborate with it. For example, I might ask it to draft a response to an email, review it's response and then ask for changes.

nodes.label: AI integration with domain-specific knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: I think it would need to be more integrated with our software application so that it was an expert on the application's features.

nodes.label: AI accuracy in transcription and summarization
nodes.label_negative: AI inaccuracy in transcription and summarization
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes the transcripts aren't 100% accurate so that's a bit of a challenge.

nodes.label: AI as time-saving efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: I was just really impressed with how much time was saved by using it.

nodes.label: AI handling administrative tasks vs human focusing on big picture
nodes.grounding_span: I expect AI to take on more of the day to day administrative tasks while I focus more on the big picture items.

nodes.label: Productivity and time efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It saved me a lot of time and research.

nodes.label: Understanding and maintaining personal competence
nodes.grounding_span: I like to understand how things work so I think I will always want to understand how the model is doing things and maintain my skills just because I want to understand.

nodes.label: Strategic focus and big-picture thinking
nodes.grounding_span: I focus more on the big picture items.

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for time-saving tasks
nodes.grounding_span: It saved me a lot of time and research.

nodes.label: Frustration with AI transcription inaccuracies
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes the transcripts aren't 100% accurate so that's a bit of a challenge.

nodes.label: Cautious optimism about AI taking over administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I expect AI to take on more of the day to day administrative tasks while I focus more on the big picture items.

nodes.label: Preference for collaboration over delegation
nodes.grounding_span: I would be more likely to collaborate with it.

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through feedback loops
nodes.grounding_span: The changes loop would last until the email is the way I want it.

nodes.label: Desire for deep understanding of underlying mechanisms
nodes.grounding_span: I like to understand how things work so I think I will always want to understand how the model is doing things.
